message:
refactor(fcp-host): complete fcp-core to fcp-kernel/fcp-evidence migration and supply chain cache keying

Import migration:
- Move ConnectorHealth, HealthMetrics, CanaryPolicy, IdempotencyClass
  and remaining protocol types from fcp_core to fcp_kernel across
  admin_state, agent_api, budget, cancellation, discovery, doctor,
  resilience, rollout, and all integration tests.
- Move LifecycleRecord, SelfCheckStatus, TransitionReason, UsageMetric,
  UsageMetricKind into #[cfg(test)] blocks where only used in tests.
- fcp-host Cargo.toml: add fcp-evidence dependency, remove
  fcp-conformance dev-dependency.

Supply chain verification:
- supply_chain.rs: Migrate imports from fcp_core to fcp_evidence for
  supply chain types (VerificationPipeline, VerificationEvidence, etc.).
- Cache key now includes effective policy, attestation, and SBOM in
  addition to artifact digest — prevents stale cache hits when policy
  or evidence changes for the same binary.
- New VerificationCacheKey struct with blake3 hash of serialized inputs.

fcp-evidence/lib.rs: Re-export additional supply chain types
(HashAlgorithm, SbomFormat, SoftwareBillOfMaterials, TrustRootBinding,
VerificationDecision/Evidence/Pipeline/ReasonCode/Step).

fcp-async-core/lib.rs: Remove raptorq re-export module — fcp-raptorq
no longer depends on asupersync raptorq.

fcp-kernel/lib.rs: Re-export ConnectorHealth and HealthMetrics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
